race.name: Forbush Memorial Classic
race.tagline: A small memorial classic race in Michigan's Nordic country — community skiing in memory of a local Nordic advocate.

climate.description: Lake-effect snow belt provides reliable conditions. Temperatures typically -15°C to -3°C in February.

course.primary: Short classic-technique course through northern Michigan forest on the Forbush Corner trail system.
features: Memorial event for local Nordic advocate

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: One of the smallest and shortest races in the database. Community memorial event.

history.summary: The Forbush Memorial Classic is a small community ski race at Forbush Corner in northern Michigan, held in memory of a local Nordic skiing advocate.
notable_facts: Forbush Corner is a beloved northern Michigan Nordic venue
Memorial race honoring a local skiing advocate
Part of Michigan's grassroots Nordic community
